meta.title: Why Strapi CMS
meta.excerpt: Technical and business rationale for choosing Strapi as the headless CMS. ROI analysis and comparison with alternatives.

seo.metaTitle: Why We Chose Strapi CMS - Technical Decision Record
seo.metaDescription: Comprehensive analysis of why Strapi was selected as our headless CMS over alternatives like Contentful and Sanity.

blocks.content: We needed a headless CMS that could handle both form submissions and content library requirements while maintaining type safety.

features.title: Self-hosted Option
features.description: Full control over data and deployment

features.title: TypeScript Support
features.description: End-to-end type safety from CMS to frontend

features.title: Cost Effective
features.description: No per-seat or API call pricing
